name: Dry Powder Fire Extinguisher — Cartridge Operated, 6 kg
shortDescription: CO₂-cartridge operated ABC extinguisher for sites that prefer field-refillable units.
longDescription: Cartridge-operated extinguishers separate the propellant from the powder charge, so a spent unit can be recharged on site with a fresh CO₂ cartridge rather than being sent for pressurised refilling. The rugged construction and large-loop stainless steel pull pin make it a common choice for transport fleets, remote sites and facilities that run their own extinguisher maintenance store. BIS approved, ISI marked, with a brass chrome-plated valve and hydraulic testing to standard.

images.alt: Dry Powder Fire Extinguisher — Cartridge Operated, 6 kg supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Extinguishing media
specs.value: MAP / SBC / PBC dry chemical powder
